title: I Already Live the Small Habits of the Wealthy
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that wealthy habits are in a different future
excerpt: A two-minute energy statement from Day 56 of a 12-week money program. The release clears the belief that millionaire-level habits belong to a wealthier version of you; the allow claims the daily practices already in place as evidence of how wealth is built.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 56 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for closing the perceived gap between current habits and wealthy ones. The release targets the belief that millionaire practices are out of reach; the allow claims what is already in place as the real substance of wealth-building.

I am ready to release all belief that millionaire habits belong to a future, wealthier version of me, that they are out of reach, that I haven't earned them yet, that they require a different life to practise. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow that I already live the small habits of the wealthy, thoughtful spending, consistent saving, calm daily money care. These are the habits wealth is built from, and they are mine. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for Day 56 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
